Petition For A Court Determination Of The Persons Entitled To Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Richard Korthauer. Paul Ellisiry of Estate Research Associates also present.

The Court stated that the matter appears to be in order and that there is no opposition. The Court granted the Petition for Court Determination of The Persons Entitled to Distribution of The Decedent's Estate (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
